Hardware Component File

BMS12V_V2.0

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference BMS12V_V2.0_20200130T122527.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 18DA0BF1
Receive ID 18DAF10B
Functional Addr 0B
Functional Name LIB 12V

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "CLARIOS",
    "soft": "SW44",
    "version": "20200121"
  }
]

Associated Devices

[P1A00]Lithium ion battery 12V ID:
[P1A01]Lithium ion battery 12V ID:
[P1A04]Lithium ion battery 12V ID:
[P1A05](TBD)DTC_disconnection ID:
[P1A06](TBD)DTC_Current_Threshold ID:
[U0075]Control module comm Bus C Off ID:
[U2148]CAN comm err (brake control unit) ID:
[U214F]CAN comm err (BCM) ID:
[U2150]CAN comm err (AIRBAG) ID:
[U215B]CAN comm err (IPDM E/R) ID:
[U2176]CAN comm err (CCM) ID:
